data.body:
Acceptance criteria is currently shimmed in the foolery knots-backend by appending it as a note with an 'Acceptance Criteria:' prefix. This is write-only — toBeat() does not extract it back from notes on read, so acceptance criteria is lost on round-trip through the knots backend.

Add a dedicated acceptance field (Option<String>) to the knot data model, parallel to description/body. This requires:

1. knots core: Add 'acceptance' column to knot_hot schema, add field to KnotCacheRecord/UpsertKnotHot, add --acceptance CLI flag to create/update, add knot.acceptance_set event kind, update rehydration and sync.
2. foolery knots-backend: Switch from addNote shim to the new acceptance field on create/update, and read it back in toBeat().
3. Workflow prompts: Include acceptance criteria in skill prompts so agents see them during execution.
data.title: Add acceptance criteria as a first-class knot field
